summary: Verified iter-93 scope: testid renames (intake-{next,back,submit}-btn, signup-{next,back}-btn), modal extractions (ReviewPreviewModal, SignupPreviewModal), and new admin HowItWorksPanel copy. All smoke checks pass. No stale legacy testids found (except unrelated apply-submit-btn in TherapistApply.jsx which is a separate page). Lint clean on all 5 files.
tests_executed: Admin More dropdown -> How it works tab: how-it-works-panel renders; how-step-0..how-step-11 all 12 present; how-step-0-open and how-step-1-open callouts present; step-0 title = '1. Generate leads'; step-11 title = '12. Pricing model'; how-it-works-loop card contains 'self-improving loop' + 'Ads -> leads -> requests -> matches -> successful matches -> smarter algorithm + more targeted ads -> more leads'
Landing /#start: OLD 'next-btn' absent; NEW 'intake-next-btn' present on initial step
Therapists /therapists/join#signup-form: OLD 'signup-next'/'signup-back' (no -btn suffix) absent; NEW 'signup-next-btn' present and correctly disabled on empty Step 1 Basics

grep sweep of /app/frontend + /app/backend for legacy 'next-btn|back-btn|submit-btn|signup-next|signup-back' (no -btn) -> only hit was 'apply-submit-btn' in TherapistApply.jsx (separate apply flow, unrelated to this rename)
ESLint clean: IntakeForm.jsx, TherapistSignup.jsx, ReviewPreviewModal.jsx, SignupPreviewModal.jsx, HowItWorksPanel.jsx
tests_not_executed: Did not walk the full 8-step patient intake to completion and open intake preview modal (heavy flow; scope here is rename verification + prior iter_42 already covered the structural refactor).
Did not walk the full 9-step therapist signup to completion and open signup preview modal (same rationale).

Modal prop-wiring validated via code inspection only: ReviewPreviewModal receives data/submitting/onClose/onConfirm/onToggleReceipt; SignupPreviewModal receives data/onClose/onConfirm/submitting; all testids present per source (intake-preview-modal, intake-preview-submit, intake-preview-edit, intake-preview-receipt-checkbox, intake-preview-deep-section, signup-preview-modal, signup-preview-deep-match, signup-preview-back, signup-preview-confirm).
critical_code_review_comments: Unrelated finding (NOT part of this iter): /app/frontend/src/pages/TherapistApply.jsx still uses 'apply-submit-btn' — this is correctly scoped to the 'therapist applies to a specific referral' flow, not the signup wizard, so the naming is fine. No action needed.
HowItWorksPanel.jsx lines up cleanly: 12 STEPS entries, two with open[] arrays (indices 0 and 1) -> matches expected how-step-{0,1}-open. Read-only, no API wiring needed. Copy reads well.
test_credentials: Admin master password admin123! from /app/memory/test_credentials.md — works.
context_for_next_testing_agent: iter-93 scope (testid renames + modal extractions + admin HowItWorks copy) verified via Playwright + lint + grep. No regressions. If next iter touches the intake/signup wizards, re-run the full 8-step / 9-step walkthroughs and actually open both preview modals to validate the onConfirm handler fires POST /api/patients/intake and the therapist signup POST respectively.
